summary: Backend adds a migration step to re-add the predefined game if missing during upgrade, and HomePage now waits for actor initialization and lists returned games as cards. However, automatic seeding on fresh deploy is not evidenced, and the Home click-through route behavior is not shown in the diff summary. Home loading/error copy appears changed, risking regression against the stated acceptance criteria.

missing_requirements.requirement: On a fresh deploy with no prior state, getAllGames() returns an array that includes a game with id "match-word-to-image" (automatic seeding at canister initialization).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff only shows upgrade-time seeding via migration.run(old). There is no explicit initialization-time seeding of persistentGames in backend/main.mo, and persistentGames is initialized as empty.

missing_requirements.requirement: No user-facing text is introduced on the backend.
missing_requirements.reason: The migration introduces new English name/description strings for the predefined game; these fields are typically displayed in the UI and thus constitute user-facing text being added on the backend.

missing_requirements.requirement: Clicking the "Match Word to Image" card navigates to /games/match-word-to-image and renders the existing Game Launch experience for that game.
missing_requirements.reason: HomePage maps games to <GameCard>, but the diff summary does not include any evidence that GameCard (or HomePage) performs navigation to /games/$gameId on click.

missing_requirements.requirement: If getAllGames() is loading or errors, Home continues to show the existing English loading and error states (no regressions).
missing_requirements.reason: HomePage’s loading/error UI and copy shown in the diff (e.g., "Loading games...", "Failed to load games") may differ from prior existing states; the diff provides no evidence that these are unchanged.

hallucinated_features.description: Added a new backend migration module (backend/migration.mo) that seeds the predefined game with specific metadata (colors, tags, icon id, description).
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-15 requires ensuring the game exists after init/upgrade, but does not request adding a new migration file or adding specific extra metadata values beyond ensuring presence.
